name: Whole Wheat Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix flours, sugar, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
3. Stir in buttermilk and vegetable oil until well combined.
4. Shape dough into 6 balls.
5. Roll each ball into a 9-inch square on a lightly floured, cloth-covered board.
6. Cut into 2-1/4-inch squares.
7. Brush each square with melted butter.
8. Place the squares on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Sprinkle with coarse salt or sesame seeds or poppy seeds if desired.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until crisp and golden.
About 8 dozen crackers can be made from this recipe.
